00038 
00039 package java.lang;
00040 
00041 import java.io.InputStream;
00042 import jelatine.VMResourceStream;
00043 
00067 public final class Class
00068 {
00069     /* This class is a bootstrap class, its internal layout is managed by
00070      * the Jelatine VM */
00071     private String name;
00072     private int id;
00073     private byte is_array;
00074     private byte is_interface;
00075 
00080     Class()
00081     {
00082     }
00083 
00091     public String toString()
00092     {
00093         return (isInterface() ? "interface " : "class ") + getName();
00094     }
00095 
00109     public native static Class forName(String name)
00110         throws ClassNotFoundException;
00111 
00126     public native Object newInstance() throws InstantiationException,
00127         IllegalAccessException;
00128 
00136     public native boolean isInstance(Object o);
00137 
00152     public native boolean isAssignableFrom(Class c)
00153         throws NullPointerException;
00154 
00161     public boolean isInterface()
00162     {
00163         if (is_interface == 1)
00164             return true;
00165         else
00166             return false;
00167     }
00168 
00175     public boolean isArray()
00176     {
00177         if (is_array == 1)
00178             return true;
00179         else
00180             return false;
00181     }
00182 
00210     public String getName()
00211     {
00212         if (name == null) {
00213             name = getInternalName().replace('/', '.');
00214         }
00215 
00216         return name;
00217     }
00218 
00224     private native String getInternalName();
00225 
00236     public InputStream getResourceAsStream(String name)
00237     {
00238         StringBuffer path = new StringBuffer(name);
00239 
00240         if (path.charAt(0) == '/') {
00241             /* Absolute path, remove the leading slash */
00242             path.deleteCharAt(0);
00243         } else {
00244             /* Relative path, prepend the directory where the class is found */
00245             StringBuffer dir = new StringBuffer(getName());
00246             int last_slash = 0;
00247 
00248             for (int i = 0; i < dir.length(); i++) {
00249                 if (dir.charAt(i) == '.') {
00250                     dir.setCharAt(i, '/');
00251                     last_slash = i;
00252                 }
00253             }
00254 
00255             if (last_slash != 0) {
00256                 dir.delete(last_slash + 1, dir.length());
00257                 path.insert(0, dir);
00258             }
00259         }
00260 
00261         VMResourceStream rs = new VMResourceStream(path.toString());
00262 
00263         if (rs.open()) {
00264             return rs;
00265         } else {
00266             return null;
00267         }
00268     }
00269 }
